Package me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.behavior

Interface EntityBehavior

All Known Subinterfaces:
CreatureBehavior, VillagerBehavior
public interface EntityBehavior
Represents Entity Behavior.

Some of these may require EntityMemory(ies) to be present or not present, so calling some of these methods will not always work.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default @NotNull BehaviorResult
    backupIfClose​(int minDistance)
    Makes this Mob back up if it is too close, with no speed modifier.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    backupIfClose​(int minDistance, float speedModifier)
    Makes this Mob back up if it is too close.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    eraseIf​(@NotNull Predicate<Mob> function, @NotNull EntityMemory<?> memory)
    Erases a memory if function returns true.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    interactWithDoor()
    Makes this Mob interact with the nearest door.
    default @NotNull BehaviorResult
    jumpOnBed()
    Makes this Mob jump on a Bed, with no speed Modifier.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    jumpOnBed​(float speedMod)
    Makes this Mob jump on a Bed.
    default @NotNull BehaviorResult
    meleeAttack()
    Makes this Mob perform a Melee Attack, with a cooldown of 3 seconds (60 ticks).
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    meleeAttack​(int cooldown)
    Makes this Mob perform a Melee Attack.
    default @NotNull BehaviorResult
    moveToCelebrateLocation​(int minDist)
    Moves this Mob to a Village's Celebration Location for winning a raid, with no speed modifier.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    moveToCelebrateLocation​(int minDist, float speedMod)
    Moves this Mob to a Village's Celebration Location for winning a raid.
    default @NotNull BehaviorResult
    moveToWantedItem​(int minDist)
    Makes this Entity move to its wanted item, with no speed modifier.
    default @NotNull BehaviorResult
    moveToWantedItem​(int minDist, float speedMod)
    Makes this Entity move to its wanted item, with requireTarget set to true.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    moveToWantedItem​(int minDist, float speedMod, boolean requireTarget)
    Makes this Entity move to its wanted item.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    passiveIf​(@NotNull EntityMemory<?> memory, int durationTicks)
    Makes this Entity become Passive is a Memory is present.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    reactToBell()
    Makes this Mob react to a Bell ringing, symbolizing an incoming raid.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    ringBell()
    Makes this Mob ring the nearest bell.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    sleep()
    Makes this Mob sleep in a bed.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    socializeAtBell()
    Makes this Mob socialize at the Village's Bell.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    wakeUp()
    Wakes up this Mob if it is sleeping.

  • Method Details

    • backupIfClose

      @NotNull @NotNull BehaviorResult backupIfClose​(int minDistance, float speedModifier)
      Makes this Mob back up if it is too close.
      Parameters:
      minDistance - Minimum Distance to back up
      speedModifier - Speed Modifier while backing up
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior

    • backupIfClose

      @NotNull default @NotNull BehaviorResult backupIfClose​(int minDistance)
      Makes this Mob back up if it is too close, with no speed modifier.
      Parameters:
      minDistance - Minimum Distance to back up
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior

    • passiveIf

      @NotNull @NotNull BehaviorResult passiveIf​(@NotNull @NotNull EntityMemory<?> memory, int durationTicks) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Makes this Entity become Passive is a Memory is present.
      Parameters:
      memory - Memory to use
      durationTicks - How long to be passive, in ticks
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if memory is null

    • eraseIf

      @NotNull @NotNull BehaviorResult eraseIf​(@NotNull @NotNull Predicate<Mob> function, @NotNull @NotNull EntityMemory<?> memory) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Erases a memory if function returns true.
      Parameters:
      function - Function to test containing Mob
      memory - Memory to remove if function returns true
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if function or memory is null

    • moveToCelebrateLocation

      @NotNull @NotNull BehaviorResult moveToCelebrateLocation​(int minDist, float speedMod)
      Moves this Mob to a Village's Celebration Location for winning a raid.
      Parameters:
      minDist - Minimum Distance to location
      speedMod - Speed Modifier while moving
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior

    • moveToCelebrateLocation

      @NotNull default @NotNull BehaviorResult moveToCelebrateLocation​(int minDist)
      Moves this Mob to a Village's Celebration Location for winning a raid, with no speed modifier.
      Parameters:
      minDist - Minimum Distance to location
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior

    • moveToWantedItem

      @NotNull @NotNull BehaviorResult moveToWantedItem​(int minDist, float speedMod, boolean requireTarget)
      Makes this Entity move to its wanted item.
      Parameters:
      minDist - Minimum Distance from Item
      speedMod - Speed Modifier while moving
      requireTarget - Whether a EntityMemory.WALKING_TARGET is required (if false, requires there to not be one, defaults to true)
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior

    • moveToWantedItem

      @NotNull default @NotNull BehaviorResult moveToWantedItem​(int minDist, float speedMod)
      Makes this Entity move to its wanted item, with requireTarget set to true.
      Parameters:
      minDist - Minimum Distance from Item
      speedMod - Speed Modifier while moving
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior

    • moveToWantedItem

      @NotNull default @NotNull BehaviorResult moveToWantedItem​(int minDist)
      Makes this Entity move to its wanted item, with no speed modifier.
      Parameters:
      minDist - Minimum Distance from Item
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior

    • jumpOnBed

      @NotNull @NotNull BehaviorResult jumpOnBed​(float speedMod)
      Makes this Mob jump on a Bed.
      Parameters:
      speedMod - Speed Modifier while locating a bed
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior

    • jumpOnBed

      @NotNull default @NotNull BehaviorResult jumpOnBed()
      Makes this Mob jump on a Bed, with no speed Modifier.
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior

      @NotNull @NotNull BehaviorResult meleeAttack​(int cooldown)
      Makes this Mob perform a Melee Attack.
      Parameters:
      cooldown - Cooldown, in ticks, before the next attack
      Returns:
      Result of Behavior

      Result of Behavior
